overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's urban environment. The journey traverses covered alleys, ascends staircases, explores neon-lit commercial streets, and culminates at a panoramic overlook of the foggy, holographic-billboard-covered cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian alley with vending machines

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a white shirt through a covered urban alleyway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking ahead of the player character

entered.detail: metal and concrete overhead structure covering the alley
wooden bench with orange seating against the left wall
tall vending machine with illuminated display on the left side
illuminated neon sign for Pure Overkill shop in the distance
entrance to a blue-railed staircase at the end of the alley
metal barrel with fire burning near the staircase entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered urban alleyway at night, with the camera following a pedestrian in a white shirt. The environment features an orange bench, vending machines, and neon signage, with a burning barrel marking the entrance to a blue staircase at the far end.

events.description: character begins ascending the blue-railed staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs with blue metal railings on both sides

entered.detail: concrete stairs with bright blue painted metal railings
blue painted metal handrail along the left side of stairs
concrete landing platform at the top of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow stairwell with distinctive blue railings, moving from the covered alley to an upper level. The burning barrel remains visible to the right as the camera climbs, transitioning from mixed lighting to artificial indoor lighting.

events.description: exits stairwell onto elevated outdoor walkway

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper level walkway with views of distant skyscrapers

entered.detail: weathered concrete bench on the left side of the walkway
tall buildings with illuminated windows visible through the haze
scattered newspapers and litter on the concrete ground

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs onto an elevated walkway, the scene reveals a concrete bench and scattered debris. The metal railing now runs along the right side as the path overlooks the hazy cityscape with distant illuminated skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with food stalls and neon signage

events.description: descends from elevated walkway to street level
crossing the wet asphalt road with neon reflections

agents.ego_description: navigating through the commercial district, crossing streets and passing food vendors

notable_agents.action: parked car near the food stall area

entered.detail: street food vendor stall with colorful umbrella
dark colored sedan parked along the street
large red torii gate structure with neon lighting
tall street lamp with green illuminated light
multi-story buildings with various neon signs and storefronts
wall with spray-painted graffiti text

segments.scene_description: The character descends to street level into a vibrant commercial district illuminated by neon signs. The scene features a food stall with an umbrella, parked vehicles, and a distinctive red torii gate structure. The camera crosses the wet asphalt road reflecting the neon lights while passing various storefronts.

events.description: enters narrow alley and transitions to indoor stairwell
lighting shifts from neon outdoor to warm artificial indoor

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow alley and climbing indoor stairs toward a corridor

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure walking ahead in the corridor

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement poster for Real Water featuring a smiling man
metal railing along the right side of the indoor walkway
wall-mounted linear fluorescent lights
covered concrete walkway with trash scattered on the ground

segments.scene_description: The character ducks into a narrow alley and enters an indoor corridor, transitioning from the neon-lit street to artificial lighting. The environment features a prominent Real Water advertisement poster, metal railings, and a silhouetted figure walking ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated overlook with panoramic city views

events.description: exits covered corridor onto open overlook with cityscape view

agents.ego_description: walking along the overlook railing while viewing the expansive neon cityscape

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing at the overlook viewing the city

entered.detail: towering buildings covered in giant glowing advertisements and holographic displays
metal safety railing along the edge of the overlook platform
red traffic lights suspended over the street below
tall cyberpunk-style buildings with intricate lighting and architecture
multiple bright neon signs and commercial displays on building facades
wide concrete viewing platform overlooking the city

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens onto a breathtaking panoramic overlook of Night City. The camera moves along a railing overlooking massive holographic billboards, futuristic skyscrapers, and dense neon advertisements glowing through the hazy night air. A lone pedestrian stands at the overlook taking in the view of the sprawling cyberpunk metropolis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the dense urban layers of Night City, transitioning from a claustrophobic alleyway to a sweeping panoramic overlook. It begins in a covered night alley beside neon signage and a burning barrel, following a pedestrian up a narrow blue stairwell that leads from the dim street to an elevated concrete walkway. As the camera descends back to street level, the scene opens into a vibrant commercial district where wet asphalt reflects the glow of neon signs, food stalls, and a red torii gate. The path then narrows again as the character ducks through an indoor corridor marked by a Real Water advertisement, moving past a silhouetted figure toward the light. Finally, the environment expands into a breathtaking overlook, where the camera glides along a railing to reveal a sprawling metropolis of massive holographic billboards and futuristic skyscrapers glowing through the hazy night air.
